summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustLayer's new comparison feature. All major comparison functionality working perfectly including History page selection, Compare Selected button, comparison view layout, and Compare from Results dialog.

minor_bugs.issue: Too lenient CSV validation - accepts malformed CSV instead of returning 400 error

passed_tests: History page displays 3 test validations with scores 45, 34, 78
Checkbox selection shows A/B labels correctly
Compare Selected button appears when 2 items selected
Navigation to /compare route from History page
Comparison view loads with Report A and Report B side-by-side
Score rings display correct values with delta indicator
Summary stats show side-by-side with delta badges
Claims comparison displays in two columns
Back navigation from comparison page works
Compare button in Results dashboard opens selector dialog
Selector dialog lists available validations from history
Navigation to comparison from Results page works
Demo mode shows trust score 34 with 16 claims
Filter tabs functionality (ALL, WRONG, VERIFIED, PARTIAL, etc.)
Backend API endpoints for validations CRUD operations
Comparison data availability (3 validations with full data)
Full validation data retrieval for comparison features
success_percentage: Backend: 94% (15/16 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all comparison features working)
